phaseName: Analyze COBOL and capture reference outputs
goal: Understand the COBOL program's record layouts, I/O paths, and business logic, and produce reference output files that the Python implementation must match.
summary: Phase 1 completed: analyzed /app/src/program.cbl (164 lines, sequential SEQUENTIAL access, all USAGE DISPLAY, no COMP/COMP-3), recorded per-file FD layouts, captured initial data state in /tmp/initial_data (ACCOUNTS=102B, BOOKS=84B, TRANSACTIONS=66B), compiled with GnuCOBOL 3.1.2 to /tmp/program_cobol, ran from /app, and snapshotted post-run files to /tmp/cobol_baseline. With current INPUT.DAT (U001U002B007200), B007 is not in BOOKS.DAT, so validation fails and no .DAT files are modified — baseline equals initial. Reference stdout is " \nTransaction failed due to validation errors\n".
stepSummaries:
1. Read /app/src/program.cbl and inspect /app/src/INPUT.DAT plus the initial /app/data/*.DAT files to understand record formats, lengths, and field semantics. [verified]
  2. Back up initial /app/data/*.DAT to a snapshot directory so the comparison can be repeated. [verified]
  3. Compile /app/src/program.cbl with GnuCOBOL 3 and run it from /app, then snapshot the resulting data files as the reference baseline. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 verification was read-only file inspection (smoke). Step 2 was a real cp + cmp (smoke). Step 3 was a real compile + run with captured stdout (smoke). All three steps exercised real artifacts.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: cmp & ls on real files; Step 2: cmp returns 0 on snapshots; Step 3: cobc compile exit 0, binary executes, cmp between baseline and initial returns 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to produce a reference baseline of ACCOUNTS/BOOKS/TRANSACTIONS.DAT files and a compiled COBOL binary at /tmp/program_cobol; both produced and verified.
gateVerdicts.evidence: /tmp/program_cobol exists and is executable; /tmp/cobol_baseline/{ACCOUNTS,BOOKS,TRANSACTIONS}.DAT exist with 102/84/66 bytes matching the initial state because B007 is missing.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred; all planned work completed.
